_comment: What the agent checks each run. Edit freely.
_pr_scopes_comment: Concentric PR scopes. Each scope = its own branch and PR; never bundled. Mechanical = blind autofix (sitemap, robots). Metadata = small React component edits (canonical, JSON-LD, og:url, description trim). Perf = resource hints + CLS reservations + image audit reporting. Content = striking-distance title/description rewrites informed by GSC. Anything outside these scopes must be raised in the GitHub issue, never PR'd.

metadata_pr_allowed_changes: Add or modify <link rel="canonical"> on a marketing page
Add or modify JSON-LD structured data (Organization / SoftwareApplication / WebPage / FAQPage / BreadcrumbList) on a marketing page
Add or modify og:url meta tag
Trim a meta description that is over 165 characters to <=160 characters preserving meaning
Add or modify meta robots tag (only to add or remove noindex, never to change index/noindex on the live marketing routes)
metadata_pr_forbidden: Modify route titles or H1 text (those are content_pr scope)
Modify hero copy, body copy, CTAs
Touch any file under src/pages/admin/, src/pages/internal/, or src/contexts/
perf_pr_allowed_changes: Add `loading="lazy"` to a element that is below the fold (i.e. NOT the hero / LCP candidate)
Add `fetchpriority="high"` to the LCP candidate on a marketing route
Add `<link rel="preload" as="image" href="..." imagesrcset="..." imagesizes="...">` to <head> for the LCP candidate
Add explicit width/height attributes to elements that lack them (prevents CLS)
Add `min-height` (CSS or inline style) to a div that contains dynamically loaded content above the fold (prevents CLS)
Add `font-display: swap;` to @font-face declarations or `<link rel="preload" as="font">` to font assets
Add `crossorigin="anonymous"` where needed for preloaded resources
perf_pr_forbidden: Modify image src= to point at non-existent files (image conversion is a separate workflow — only modify src after the new image is committed)
Add lazy loading to the hero / LCP candidate (will hurt LCP, not help)
Make CSS layout changes beyond min-height reservations
Touch any file under src/pages/admin/, src/pages/internal/, src/contexts/, or src/integrations/
content_pr_allowed_changes: Rewrite a route's title attribute (max 65 chars) to better target a striking-distance keyword from GSC data (positions 4-20, >=10 impressions in last 28 days)
Rewrite a route's meta description (50-165 chars) to better target a striking-distance keyword
Update H1 on a marketing page to align with the rewritten title (only if H1 was placeholder like 'Hero' OR a meaningful improvement is justified by data)
pr_scopes.content_pr_required_evidence: Each content_pr must reference the specific GSC query, current position, current impressions, and the keyword being targeted in the PR body. No speculative rewrites.
content_pr_forbidden: Open a content_pr for any keyword that does not appear in tools/seo-agent/config/keywords.json AND have GSC data showing position 4-20
Rewrite body copy, CTAs, navigation, or footer
Add new sections, components, or routes

_pre_pr_smoke_checks_comment: These match the actual CI gates on this repo. `npm run lint` (full ESLint) is intentionally NOT in this list — it has hundreds of pre-existing errors on main that are tracked separately and not gated in CI. Adding it would block every agent PR.

indexnow._comment: Public verification key. Submitted with every URL push to api.indexnow.org. Verified by Bing/Yandex/Naver fetching https://<host>/<key>.txt. Public by design — not a secret.
